title: Bill Bettini | Data & AI Strategist
description: Professional portfolio and resume of Bill Bettini — Data Architect, Product Manager, and MSDAAI candidate specializing in enterprise-scale AI, analytics, and automation.
author: Bill Bettini

projects.name: PermitFlow
projects.description: An open-source project focused on workflow automation and permit tracking. It serves as a foundation for exploring agentic task orchestration and intelligent decision-making — including prototypes built with LangChain and FlowBot site navigator.

projects.name: Professional Portfolio Site
projects.description: Hosted at www.bettini.us, this auto-updating resume and branding hub integrates GitHub and LinkedIn data. It showcases Bill’s technical work, thought leadership, and career evolution, with CI/CD workflows, and modern cloud architecture.
